positive: A cute, cartoon-style mascot character: a sleepy astronaut sloth wearing a bubble helmet, floating among tiny planets and stars. Simple character design, kawaii aesthetic, bold outlines, flat colors, sticker art style, Pixar quality, highly cheerful.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic fur, complex shading, horror elements
